title: The Kingdom Counts the Cost
description: On pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this part focuses on alabasta learns the truth. The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
scene: This scene belongs to the Alabasta Learns the Truth sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Do you still not get it...?

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Nami! Just what're you trying to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: I'm trying to calculate things right now!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: What're you even planning to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You'll understand once I do it!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Chopper! Once you reach Sanji's level,

summary: The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
